alreadyExists: An object with this name already exists.
archonCreatedNoRoles: backend does not support create-with-roles — the Archon was created without roles, assign them in RBAC → Archon assignments.
builtinRole: A builtin role (e.g. cluster-admin) cannot be edited or deleted.
oneLabelForAppendRemove: Provide exactly one label for append/remove.
revokeLastAdmin: You cannot revoke the last Archon with *-permission (self-lockout protection). Create another cluster-admin first.
roleAlreadyExists: A role with this name already exists.
selfLockout: You cannot leave the cluster without a `*`-admin (self-lockout protection). Assign another operator with cluster-admin / * first.
secretPlaintextDisabled: Entering a secret by value is disabled on the server. Switch to “Path (Vault)” and provide a vault-ref, or enable value ingestion on the Keeper side (behind a TLS front).
svcAlreadyExists: A Service with this name is already registered. Choose another name.
svcCreatorMissing: Creator AID is missing from the operators registry.
svcForbidden: Insufficient permissions for this operation (requires service.register / service.update / service.deregister).
svcInvalidDefault: check the name and git URL
synodAlreadyExists: A Synod with this name already exists.
synodLockout: Removing/modifying would leave the cluster without a `*`-admin (self-lockout protection).
synodSubsetDenied: Cannot grant a permission you don't have yourself (subset-check escalation, 403).
